name: Parallel
summary: The Parallel class contains methods for testing the parallelism of geometric objects.

methods.name: LineSegmentToLineSegment(LineSegment, LineSegment)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segments are parallel.

methods.name: LineSegmentToLineSegment(LineSegment, LineSegment, Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segments are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

methods.name: LineSegmentToPlane(LineSegment, GeometricPlane)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segment and plane are parallel.

methods.name: LineSegmentToPlane(LineSegment, GeometricPlane, Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segment and plane are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

methods.name: LineToLine(Line, Line)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given lines are parallel.

methods.name: LineToLine(Line, Line, Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given lines are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

methods.name: LineToPlane(Line, GeometricPlane)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line and plane are parallel.

methods.name: LineToPlane(Line, GeometricPlane, Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line and plane are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

methods.name: PlaneToPlane(GeometricPlane, GeometricPlane)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given planes are parallel.

methods.name: PlaneToPlane(GeometricPlane, GeometricPlane, Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given planes are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

methods.name: VectorToPlane(Vector, GeometricPlane)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given vector and plane are parallel.

methods.name: VectorToPlane(Vector, GeometricPlane, Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given vector and plane are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

methods.name: VectorToVector(Vector, Vector)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given vectors are parallel.

methods.name: VectorToVector(Vector, Vector, Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given vectors are parallel within the given angular tolerance.
